title: API Call Logging and Monitoring
description: Enabling/disabling request logging, capturing request stats, and debugging API calls across puter-js SDK and GUI DebugService

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Calls SDK methods to enable/disable/configure API logging

actors.name: puter-js SDK
actors.description: Hosts APICallLogger instance; exposes logging control methods; modules call logRequest after each API response

actors.name: GUI (DebugService)
actors.description: Service registered in initgui.js; manages log categories; propagates debug flags to child iframes via postMessage

actors.name: ExecService
actors.description: Accepts param_providers from DebugService; injects enabled_logs as query param on app launch

actors.name: App (iframe)
actors.description: Receives log.on postMessage commands from DebugService to activate logging categories

actors.name: ServiceManager
actors.description: Manages service lifecycle (register, dependency resolution, init); used by GUI to register DebugService

use_cases.name: Configure API Logging
steps: Config is merged into existing config object

use_cases.name: Log API Request
use_cases.trigger: API response received in a module (e.g. Auth.whoami)
steps: If enabled, calls apiCallLogger.logRequest({service, operation, params, result/error})

use_cases.name: Enable Log Category (GUI Debug)
steps: puter.logger.on(category) called to activate SDK-side logging
PostMessage {$:'puterjs-debug', cmd:'log.on', category} sent to all iframes via $('iframe').each

use_cases.name: Propagate Log Categories to Apps
use_cases.trigger: App launch via ExecService; or immediately via postMessage on logs(category)
steps: DebugService registers param_provider with ExecService during _init()
On app launch, ExecService collects params from all providers
If enabled_logs.length > 0, param 'enabled_logs' = categories.join(';') is injected
Launched app iframe receives enabled_logs as query param

use_cases.name: Register and Initialize Service
use_cases.trigger: register('debug', new DebugService()) called in initgui.js
steps: If deps satisfied → init_service_(name): sets status=Initializing, calls service_impl.init(), sets status=Running
If deps pending → status=Pending, waits via waiting_[] map
After init, triggers cascading init of dependent services

key_relationships: APICallLogger instantiated by puter-js SDK index.js (composition), disabled by default
SDK exposes configureAPILogging/enableAPILogging/disableAPILogging as façade over APICallLogger
API modules (Auth, etc.) call puter.apiCallLogger.logRequest() directly after API responses
DebugService extends Service; registered as 'debug' via ServiceManager in initgui.js
DebugService depends_on ExecService (retrieved via this.services.get('exec') in _init)
DebugService registers param_provider with ExecService to inject enabled_logs into app launches
DebugService propagates log categories to iframes via postMessage (log.on command)
ServiceManager manages all GUI services lifecycle with dependency-aware init ordering
important_notes: APICallLogger is in puter-js SDK (client-side JS library); DebugService is in GUI (separate module)
APICallLogger default: enabled=false; must be explicitly enabled by developer
DebugService._init() is async; uses this.services (injected by ServiceManager) to get ExecService
PostMessage from DebugService targets ALL iframes ($('iframe').each) with {$:'puterjs-debug', cmd:'log.on', category}
ServiceManager status flow: Registering→Pending(if deps missing)→Initializing→Running
ServiceManager.get() returns undefined if service not yet Running; aget() awaits Running state
